hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-z])git commit([^a-z]|$)' || exit 0; cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
hooks.statusMessage: Running cargo fmt and clippy before commit...

hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$file" | grep -q 'src/actions/' || exit 0; if grep -En 'data\["[A-Z]' "$file" | grep -v 'constants::'; then echo 'Use constants::FIELD_NAME instead of bare strings for JSON field access'; exit 1; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking constants usage in action handler...
